  \caption{Transactional write throughput (req/s) and tail latency (p99, ms) for
    \texttt{POST /threads}, which inserts a post and five comments in a single
    transaction, on PostgreSQL under default durability (50 connections, median of
    5). A representative layer of each tier is shown; the full matrix is left
    to future work. Between-layer spread is $3.3	imes$ (Prisma 2412 down to
    MikroORM 740), well below the $6.55	imes$ read spread, and the ordering tracks
    the single-row insert, so the write conclusions extend to a multi-statement
    transactional write.}

    \texttt{knex} & 2322 & 27 \\
    \texttt{prisma} & 733 & 80 \\
    \texttt{typeorm} & 1935 & 32 \\
